youtubei-js.description: JavaScript client for YouTube's InnerTube API. Used for YouTube Music API interactions.

innertube-python.description: Python client for Google's InnerTube API (YouTube, YouTube Music, YouTube Kids).

kuro-audit.description: KuroMusic Android project — InnerTube-based YouTube Music client. Contains Kotlin modules: innertube, lrclib, kizzy, kugou, jossredconnect.

youtube-transcript-mcp.description: YouTube Transcript MCP server with InnerTube ANDROID API + HTML scrape fallback.

security-auditor.description: Audits codebases for high-impact security issues using OWASP Top 10 and ASVS 5.0. Activates unified-security skill.

youtube-researcher.description: YouTube data extraction specialist. Gets transcripts, searches videos, browses channels, extracts playlists.

android-reverser.description: Android reverse engineering specialist. Decompiles APKs, extracts HTTP endpoints (Retrofit, OkHttp, Ktor, GraphQL), headers, auth patterns.

api-extractor.description: Extracts REST API specifications from Android APKs. Decompiles apps and generates OpenAPI 3.1.0 specs.

web-scraper.description: Web scraping specialist using Bright Data. Scrapes any webpage, searches Google/Bing/Yandex, extracts structured data from 40+ platforms.

kotlin-reviewer.description: Kotlin and Android code reviewer. Reviews for idiomatic patterns, coroutine safety, Jetpack Compose best practices.

kotlin-build-resolver.description: Kotlin/Gradle build error resolution specialist. Fixes compilation, dependency, and build configuration errors.

planner.description: Expert planning specialist for complex features and refactoring

architect.description: Software architecture specialist for system design and scalability

code-reviewer.description: Expert code review specialist for quality, security, and maintainability

security-reviewer.description: Security vulnerability detection and remediation specialist

tdd-guide.description: Test-Driven Development specialist enforcing write-tests-first methodology

build-error-resolver.description: Build and TypeScript error resolution specialist

refactor-cleaner.description: Dead code cleanup and consolidation specialist

docs-lookup.description: Documentation specialist using MCP for API reference

security-audit.description: Run comprehensive security audit on the codebase
security-audit.template:
Run a full security audit on this project. Use the unified-security skill and security-agent plugin. Focus on OWASP Top 10, authentication, secrets management, and Android-specific vulnerabilities.

$ARGUMENTS

extract-apis.description: Extract HTTP APIs from an Android APK
extract-apis.template:
Extract all HTTP API endpoints from this Android application. Decompile the APK, find Retrofit/OkHttp/Ktor/GraphQL endpoints, auth headers, and base URLs. Generate an OpenAPI spec.

$ARGUMENTS

youtube-transcript.description: Get transcript of a YouTube video
youtube-transcript.template:
Get the transcript of the requested YouTube video with timestamps.

$ARGUMENTS

scrape.template:
Scrape the requested URL and extract structured data. Use the Bright Data scraping tools.

$ARGUMENTS

fix-build.template:
Fix the build errors in this Kotlin/Gradle project with minimal changes.

$ARGUMENTS

plan.description: Create a detailed implementation plan for complex features

tdd.description: Enforce TDD workflow with 80%+ test coverage

code-review.description: Review code for quality, security, and maintainability

build-fix.description: Fix build and TypeScript errors with minimal changes

e2e.description: Generate and run E2E tests with Playwright

refactor-clean.description: Remove dead code and consolidate duplicates

orchestrate.description: Orchestrate multiple agents for complex tasks

learn.description: Extract patterns and learnings from session
